title: Mock Town Shows Its Teeth
description: Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.
scene: Across pages 1, 2, 3, 4, this scene centers on Bellamy, Nami, Sarquiss, Mock Town pirate, Luffy. Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: That town already looks like trouble.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: There's no way. Not now. Not never.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Well I can't just leave them be!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: O-okay, okay! Just let go of me!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What's with that uninter- ested reply!?

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Look, he fell off his horse.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Yeah, he fell off his horse.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: Could you help me get back up...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Whew... Finally back on my horse...

summary: Luffy and Zoro refuse to fight back when Bellamy’s crew humiliates them, choosing their convictions over a pointless brawl.
